metadata.title: AI n8n Workflow Generator
metadata.description: Turn a plain-language automation idea into an importable n8n workflow JSON.

page.title: Natural language to n8n workflow JSON
page.description: Describe the automation you want. The AI designs the trigger, nodes, branches, setup notes, and an import-ready workflow JSON for n8n.
page.tip: Built for founders, operators, marketers, and support teams who want automation without wiring every node by hand.

form.title: Workflow brief
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: When a Typeform lead arrives with name, email, company, and budget, qualify it, save it to Google Sheets, notify Slack if it is high intent, and send a personalized follow-up email.
form.integrationsPlaceholder: For example: Slack, Google Sheets, Gmail, Webhook
form.integrationsHelp: List the apps, databases, forms, APIs, or channels this workflow should connect. Leave it blank if you want AI to infer them from your description.
form.schedulePlaceholder: Every weekday at 9:00, or leave blank

fast.title: One prompt, full package
fast.description: Workflow JSON, setup notes, credentials, and tests.

credits.description: Sign in to save history and manage usage.
credits.insufficient: You do not have enough credits for the next generation.

safe.title: Credential-safe
safe.description: Secrets stay out of generated workflows.

lead.title: CRM customer sync
lead.prompt: Listen for newly added customers in the CRM, automatically capture customer name, contact information, source, and follow-up status, then sync the data to the internal ledger spreadsheet.

support.title: Complaint priority triage
support.prompt: Receive customer message data from external channels, use AI to assess the content, and immediately push high-priority complaint messages to a human agent for handling.

content.title: Contract expiry alert
content.prompt: Read an online contract spreadsheet every morning at 8:00, scan all rows, filter contracts expiring within the next 7 days, and push reminders to the responsible owners.

result.title: Generated workflow
result.empty: Your generated workflow JSON, setup notes, credential checklist, and test plan will appear here.

history.title: Recent workflows
history.empty: Your saved workflows will appear here after generation.

toast.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep generating.
